STEP2: PowerPoint found
STEP3: Getting selection
STEP4: Selection type: 2
STEP5: Getting shape
STEP5a: Detected picture
STEP5b: Picture exported
STEP6: Shape name: Picture 5
STEP7: Building data
STEP8: Converting to JSON
STEP9: Outputting JSON
{"isPicture":true,"pngTempPath":"C:\\Users\\u\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\raycast-cap-abc.png","name":"Picture 5","type":13,"left":2,"top":2,"width":4,"height":3,"rotation":0,"adjustments":[],"nativePptxRelPath":"native/shape_captured_1700000000005.pptx"}
STEP10: Done
